context_budget._doc: Limit facts/context injected per turn. Large artifacts fetched on-demand, not pre-loaded.

concurrency_limits._doc: Max concurrent subagents per session. Prevents context window and API cost explosion.

budget_thresholds._doc: Hard cap per individual task. Escalate or split if approaching limit.

context_compaction._doc: Only these artifact types get compacted summaries. Others are truncated or omitted.

stage_thresholds._doc: For large inputs (>2000 tokens), first summarize with a cheap model, then process summary with expensive model.

failure_action_map._doc: Maps failure categories to escalation actions. 'retry' = same model, 'think_harder' = add CoT, 'escalate' = upgrade model tier.

model_tier._doc: Task-type:complexity routing. Level 1=simple, 2=moderate, 3=complex. Route cheap tasks to cheap models.

subagent_model_routing._doc: Map agent types to model tiers. Cheap models for read-only tasks, expensive for implementation.

subagent_max_turns._doc: Explicit turn limits per agent type. Prevents runaway agents.

session_budget_visibility._doc: Inject session stats (tool calls, subagents, file mods) into every subagent prompt via SubagentStart hook. Helps agents self-regulate depth.

facts_cache._doc: Per-user cross-session facts cache. Auto-injected at session start and post-compaction. Stores conventions, toolchain details, integration gotchas.

nightshift_budget._doc: Reserve 10% of daily budget for interactive use. Nightshift consumes at most 75%.

swarm_budget._doc: Swarm-specific budget controls. MetaOptimizer adjusts per-agent budgets based on species effectiveness.
